entity.label: Jediael
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Korhite of the family of Ebiasaph, and one of the gate-keepers to the temple (1 Chr. 26:2).

nodes.label: Jediael
nodes.description: A Korhite of the family of Ebiasaph, and one of the gate-keepers to the temple (1 Chr. 26:2).

nodes.label: Meshelemiah
nodes.description: Friendship of Jehovah, a Levite of the family of the Korhites, called also Shelemiah (1 Chr. 9:21; 26:1, 2, 9, 14). He was a temple gate-keeper in the time of David.

nodes.label: Jehohanan
nodes.description: A Korhite, the head of one of the divisions of the temple porters (1 Chr. 26:3).

nodes.label: Zebadiah
nodes.description: A Korhite porter of the Lord’s house (1 Chr. 26:2). Three or four others of this name are also mentioned.

nodes.label: Zechariah
nodes.description: A Levite who assisted at the bringing up of the ark from the house of Obededom (1 Chr. 15:20-24).

verses.text: And the sons of Meshelemiah were, Zechariah the firstborn, Jediael the second, Zebadiah the third, Jathniel the fourth,
